purpose: Runtime controller for the Portal 1 credits animation. It waits for DOMContentLoaded, attaches splash dismissal handlers, then on user click/Space starts audio, draws text borders, types lyric and credit data character by character, blinks cursors, and swaps ASCII art according to lyric metadata.
invariants: cake.init must run after the HTML containers exist; it caches lyric and credit containers before scheduling any line rendering.
cake.delayMultiplier is the shared conversion from cakedata delay seconds to milliseconds.
processLyricLine and processCreditLine assume stable global lyrics and credits arrays loaded before this file.
processLetter escapes <, >, and spaces before appending via innerHTML so ASCII layout survives browser parsing.
cake.init runs only after the user dismisses the #splash overlay (click or Space) on DOMContentLoaded; this satisfies modern autoplay policy and keeps lyric typing in sync with audio.
gotchas: The file uses implicit globals such as x, timeout, and nextChar; enabling strict mode without cleanup would break it.
Most timers use string-form setTimeout, so quote escaping in cakedata text is part of the runtime contract.
initMusicPlayer relies on the local Still Alive.ogg filename next to index.html.
The DOMContentLoaded handler assumes index.html provides an element with id 'splash'; without it splash.addEventListener throws and the credits never start.

key_functions.name: init
key_functions.summary: Caches DOM containers, draws borders, initializes credits and blinkers, starts audio, then schedules lyric and credit rendering.

key_functions.name: processLyricLine
key_functions.summary: Creates or places a lyric span, optionally clears previous lyrics, changes ASCII art, and schedules per-character typing.

key_functions.name: processCreditLine
key_functions.summary: Maintains a sliding credit window and schedules per-character credit typing using the computed creditsDelay.

key_functions.name: setPicture
key_functions.summary: Renders one asciiart frame into #picturetext with HTML-sensitive characters escaped.
